name: Kali Dal
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the gram beans.
2. Place both the gram beans and kidney beans in a large pot.
3. Add 4 cups of water and bring to a boil.
4. Turn off the heat and let sit for 2 hours.
5. Add the onions, ginger, tomatoes, 1 cup water, cardamom, coriander, pepper, salt, and ghee. Mix well.
6. Bring to a boil and simmer for 4 ½ to 5 hours with the heat very low, maintaining a bare simmer during the cooking period.
7. After cooking, remove 2 to 3 cups of the beans and blend them until smooth. Return to the pot.
8. Keep the dal on a low simmer.
9. Heat ghee and add the cumin seeds when the ghee is very hot.
10. After 10 seconds, add the minced onion and cook gently for 10 minutes, stirring constantly. Pour over the dal and mix in the coriander.
11. Simmer until heated through.
12. Serve with Royal Vegetable & Rice Casserole.
